<!-- Generated by Retort -->

# OmniPost -- Team Ownership

Detailed team definitions, file ownership, and responsibilities.

---

## backend

**Description:** Server-side API routes, business logic services, scheduling, and configuration.

**Owns:**

- `app/api/**`
- `lib/services/**`
- `lib/scheduler/**`
- `lib/config/**`

**Key Responsibilities:**

- Implement and maintain REST API routes using Next.js App Router
- Build business logic services for content publishing, platform integrations
- Manage background job scheduling and queue processing
- Maintain application configuration and environment variable handling
- Ensure all endpoints use `await isAuthenticated()`, Zod validation, DOMPurify sanitization, and rate limiting

---

## frontend

**Description:** Dashboard UI, marketing pages, shared components, hooks, and styling.

**Owns:**

- `app/(dashboard)/**`
- `app/(marketing)/**`
- `components/**`
- `hooks/**`
- `styles/**`

**Key Responsibilities:**

- Build and maintain dashboard pages and marketing/landing pages
- Create reusable React components (functional, named exports, CSS Modules)
- Develop custom hooks for shared stateful logic
- Ensure WCAG 2.1 AA accessibility compliance
- Optimize performance with React.memo, useMemo, useCallback, lazy loading
- Maintain responsive design for mobile support

---

## data

**Description:** Database schema, migrations, Prisma configuration, and data access layer.

**Owns:**

- `prisma/**`
- `lib/db/**`

**Key Responsibilities:**

- Design and maintain the Prisma schema
- Create and manage database migrations
- Build type-safe data access utilities
- Optimize database queries and indexes
- Manage seed data and test fixtures

---

## infra

**Description:** Azure infrastructure-as-code (Bicep), deployment scripts, and cloud configuration.

**Owns:**

- `infra/**`
- `scripts/**`

**Key Responsibilities:**

- Author and maintain Bicep templates for Azure resources
- Manage Azure Web Apps, Key Vault, DNS, monitoring configuration
- Create deployment and utility scripts
- Ensure infrastructure follows security best practices
- Document infrastructure architecture and deployment procedures

---

## devops

**Description:** CI/CD pipelines, GitHub Actions workflows, and deployment automation.

**Owns:**

- `.github/workflows/**`

**Key Responsibilities:**

- Build and maintain GitHub Actions CI/CD pipelines
- Configure automated testing, linting, and deployment workflows
- Manage staging and production deployment pipelines
- Monitor pipeline health and optimize build times
- Implement branch protection and required checks

---

## testing

**Description:** Test suites, test utilities, fixtures, Jest configuration, and test infrastructure.

**Owns:**

- `__tests__/**`
- `tests/**`

**Key Responsibilities:**

- Write and maintain unit, integration, and component tests
- Maintain Jest configuration and test setup files
- Build shared test utilities, mocks, and fixtures
- Target 80% code coverage across the project
- Ensure all external services are properly mocked
- Test authentication, authorization, input validation, and error handling

---

## security

**Description:** Authentication, authorization, input sanitization, rate limiting, and security middleware.

**Owns:**

- `lib/auth/**`
- `app/api/_utils/auth.ts`
- `app/api/_utils/sanitize.ts`
- `app/api/_utils/rateLimit.ts`

**Key Responsibilities:**

- Implement and maintain JWT authentication flow
- Build and update input sanitization utilities (DOMPurify)
- Configure and maintain rate limiting presets (AUTH, GENERAL, AI)
- Audit API routes for security compliance
- Ensure OWASP Top 10 compliance
- Review security-sensitive changes across all teams

---

## docs

**Description:** Project documentation, guides, architecture docs, and markdown files.

**Owns:**

- `docs/**`
- `*.md`

**Key Responsibilities:**

- Maintain README, CONTRIBUTING, SECURITY, and CHANGELOG
- Write and update API documentation and migration guides
- Document architecture decisions and design patterns
- Keep copilot-instructions.md and agent context files current
- Ensure documentation accuracy across code changes

---

## quality

**Description:** Code quality tooling -- ESLint, Prettier, TypeScript configuration, and formatting rules.

**Owns:**

- `eslint.config.mjs`
- `.prettierrc*`
- `tsconfig.json`
- `tsconfig.jest.json`

**Key Responsibilities:**

- Configure and maintain ESLint rules (Next.js, TypeScript, React plugins)
- Configure Prettier formatting rules
- Maintain TypeScript compiler options in strict mode
- Manage Jest TypeScript configuration
- Define and enforce code quality standards across the project

---

## marketing (custom)

**Description:** Marketing automation -- lead scoring, email sequences, engagement metrics, and agent skills.

**Owns:**

- `.agents/skills/**`
- `app/api/leads/**`
- `app/api/forms/**`
- `app/api/sequences/**`
- `app/api/engagement-metrics/**`
- `lib/scoring/**`
- `lib/sequences/**`
- `lib/engagement-worker/**`

**Key Responsibilities:**

- Build lead scoring and qualification algorithms
- Implement email sequence automation and A/B testing
- Track engagement metrics and build analytics dashboards
- Develop and maintain agent skill definitions (34 skills across 6 categories)
- Build form handling and lead capture endpoints
- Implement engagement worker for background processing
- Create marketing attribution and funnel analysis tools
